name: maputo-local
_comment: What this deployment SHOULD have. The profile discovers what it DOES have; this file
decides whether a gap is a bug (required -> FAIL) or legitimately N/A (absent -> SKIP).
Without it, discovery would let an unseeded deployment go green by skipping everything.
Measured against the local mz + mz.maputo stack on 2026-07-16.

_rationale.workflow.pgr.actions.ESCALATE: REQUIRED, not absent — corrected 2026-07-16. ESCALATE is intended product config (added by PR #635 / commit ce302053: PENDINGATLME -> ESCALATE -> PENDINGATSUPERVISOR with role PGR_LME), and bomet's `ke` has it. mz.maputo lacked it only because tenant_bootstrap copies the PGR businessService from the `pg` demo tenant, which predates that PR — a real seed gap, not an N/A. api/pgr-escalation test 2 self-heals it (it patches the wirings into the live workflow, which is its stated purpose); do NOT gate that test on this capability, since it is the thing that creates it. Declaring this 'absent' would bless the gap and permanently skip #521 here.
_rationale.mdms.rejectionReasons: Deliberate red. Neither the schema nor any data exists on any tenant of either deployment, while the GRO reject modal reads this master. Seeded locally on 2026-07-16 (4 rows at mz), so this should now pass — if it goes red again the tenant was wiped (see the fast-path dump trap).
_rationale.ui.citizen.attachmentDetailRender: Required so a real regression stays visibly red rather than being hidden behind the old ATTACHMENT_DETAIL_UNSUPPORTED env hatch.
_rationale.personas.ward-scoped-csr: No ward-scoped CSR persona is onboarded here; the bomet-shaped BOMET_CSR_* defaults do not exist.
_rationale.locales.multi: Only en_IN is meaningfully seeded (16899 rows). pt_BR/fr_FR/hi_IN exist but are 205-row stubs, not real translations.
_rationale.tenant.citySubTenant: Two-level: root mz + city mz.maputo. The configurator tenant-search test is meaningful here.
